examination_log.method: Initial port from benjaminogbonna/whisper-tiny-igbo (only available community Igbo Whisper)
examination_log.rationale: Igbo is significantly underserved in community ASR. The only Whisper fine-tunes available on HF are: benjaminogbonna/whisper-tiny-igbo (157% WER in our 04-21 audit, but the only ungated option) and NCAIR1/Igbo-ASR (1.1k downloads, gated/restricted access — can't redistribute). We're shipping the tiny-igbo as a placeholder with explicit quality-limitation disclosure in the README; recommend production users route through openai/whisper-large-v3 multilingual with language='ig' for materially better quality. Slated for a fallback-multilingual-variant when we build that infrastructure.

wer_audit_result.current: same as WPL — same base model

quality_rating.label: Limited (production users should route to multilingual fallback)
quality_rating.production_recommendation: Use openai/whisper-large-v3 with language='ig' for serious Igbo transcription
